name: @tenkacloud/challenge-catalog
description: TenkaCloud problem catalog. Validates metadata.json against SCHEMA.json and cross-refs template.yaml Outputs + portal slot files.

scripts.reindex: bun run scripts/build-index.ts && bun run scripts/estimate-cost.ts --write
scripts.setup: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo 'pre-commit hook enabled (auto-reindex).'
scripts.validate: bun test scripts/validate-problems.test.ts scripts/new-problem.test.ts && bun run scripts/validate-problems.ts && bun run scripts/check-template-ascii.ts && bun run scripts/check-template-security.ts
